response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A (Lyrics fields in reference JSON were null). 2. JSON Usage: 100% manual transcription and translation performed for both songs ('Sukideka!' and 'Private EyeZ'). Used visual elements (tarot cards, on-screen text) to verify ambiguous homophones. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed visual title cards during silent/instrumental intros. Fixed timestamp overlaps for correct visual-audio synchronization.

subtitles.original: 好きじゃない？ 好きじゃない？ あぁ！
subtitles.english: Don't you like me? Don't you like me? Ah!

subtitles.original: スキデカ！〜スキはデカく回顧録？〜
subtitles.english: [Title: Sukideka! ~Love is a Giant Memoir?~]

subtitles.original: Loveのレポート 冷めやらぬ感情
subtitles.english: My love report, feelings that won't cool down.

subtitles.original: 馬鹿じゃないの 目を醒まして ねぇ
subtitles.english: Aren't you stupid? Wake up, hey!

subtitles.original: 全然平常心で 興味と過信だらけ
subtitles.english: With total composure, full of interest and overconfidence,

subtitles.original: さらけ出して Want you
subtitles.english: exposing it all, I want you.

subtitles.original: チェックアウトできなくて困る
subtitles.english: I can't check out, and it's troubling,

subtitles.original: でもたまに構ってあげる
subtitles.english: but I'll pay attention to you sometimes.

subtitles.original: クセになりちまう 絶妙な距離感
subtitles.english: It'll become a habit, an exquisite sense of distance.

subtitles.original: ゲーム 近く 近付く
subtitles.english: Game, close, getting closer.

subtitles.original: 一生デカく デカく デカく
subtitles.english: Forever giant, giant, giant,

subtitles.original: 何でも頂戴 最大好き作りましょう
subtitles.english: give me anything, let's make the biggest love!

subtitles.original: それがライクなのかな？ ラブなのかな？ はたまた両方なんでわ！
subtitles.english: Is that like? Or is it love? Or is it both, like, what!

subtitles.original: なし あり なし あり 絶対あんだろう
subtitles.english: No, yes, no, yes, there definitely is!

subtitles.original: そしてデカく デカく デカく デカく デカくデカく 夢は全部叶うからね防衛
subtitles.english: And giant, giant, giant, giant! Giant, giant, all dreams will come true!

subtitles.original: 結局 思い描いた タロット占い
subtitles.english: In the end, what we envisioned... tarot fortune telling!

subtitles.original: 一緒にやっていきましょう
subtitles.english: Let's do this together!

subtitles.original: 好きは デカく 好きデカく
subtitles.english: Love is giant, love is giant!

subtitles.original: 縛らなく付き合い よろしくな
subtitles.english: Please be with me without tying me down!

subtitles.original: たくさんの感情 みんなに伝えて
subtitles.english: Deliver many feelings to everyone.

subtitles.original: 俺だけにみせてくれたって いいな いいな
subtitles.english: I hope you show it only to me, wouldn't that be nice?

subtitles.original: 一人と区別 サービスはできません
subtitles.english: No special treatment or services for just one person.

subtitles.original: それでもいいかな？ お、ね、が、い
subtitles.english: Is that still okay? P-l-e-a-s-e.

subtitles.original: もっと知りたいことだらけ
subtitles.english: There's still so much more I want to know,

subtitles.original: でも知らない方が幸せか
subtitles.english: but maybe ignorance is bliss.

subtitles.original: 絶妙な距離感
subtitles.english: An exquisite sense of distance.

subtitles.original: ゲーム バランス 取り合う
subtitles.english: A game of balancing with each other.

subtitles.original: 一生つかず離れずは 辛いから
subtitles.english: Because being together yet apart is painful...

subtitles.original: ちょうどよく按配で お互いもっと分かり合えたら
subtitles.english: ...let's keep just the right balance. If we could understand each other more...

subtitles.original: 特別になれる？ いつも通じ合える
subtitles.english: ...could we become special? We'd always understand each other.

subtitles.original: この先は 想像できないけど
subtitles.english: Though I can't imagine what lies ahead,

subtitles.original: 結構いい感じかも ギリギリにでもいいか
subtitles.english: it might actually feel pretty good. Even if it's barely there, is it okay?

subtitles.original: そのまま進みます 踏みつけて行きます
subtitles.english: We'll keep going just like this, we'll trample right through!

subtitles.original: 今後の我々について話し合っていきたい！ - そんなのいらないでしょ！ - いいからほら！ Three, Two, One, Let's Go!
subtitles.english: I want to discuss our future! - We don't need that! - Come on, just do it! Three, Two, One, Let's Go!

subtitles.original: 一生スレ違うふたり
subtitles.english: Two people who always cross paths,

subtitles.original: 一生デカく デカく デカく デカく
subtitles.english: forever giant, giant, giant, giant,

subtitles.original: 何でも頂戴 最大好き作りましょう
subtitles.english: give me anything, let's make the biggest love!

subtitles.original: それがライクなのかな？ ラブなのかな？ はたまた両方なんでわ！
subtitles.english: Is that like? Or is it love? Or is it both, like, what!

subtitles.original: なし あり なし あり 絶対あんだろう
subtitles.english: No, yes, no, yes, there definitely is!

subtitles.original: そしてデカく デカく デカく デカく デカくデカく 夢は全部叶うからね
subtitles.english: And giant, giant, giant, giant! Giant, giant, all dreams will come true!

subtitles.original: 結局 思い描いた タロット占い
subtitles.english: In the end, what we envisioned... tarot fortune telling!

subtitles.original: 一緒にやっていきましょう
subtitles.english: Let's do this together!

subtitles.original: 一生つかず離れずあきれず ちょうどよく按配で
subtitles.english: Forever keeping a distance, never getting tired of each other, in perfect balance.

subtitles.original: お前ともっと くだらないことでも 笑っていたい
subtitles.english: I want to laugh with you more, even over the silliest things.

subtitles.original: 付き合っていたい
subtitles.english: I want to be with you.

subtitles.original: この先も変わらない関係性を
subtitles.english: An unchanging relationship even from now on,

subtitles.original: 不思議な関係 お見知りおきを
subtitles.english: please get to know our mysterious relationship!

subtitles.original: Private EyeZ
subtitles.english: [Song: Private EyeZ]

subtitles.original: 超常現象フェノメノン 行きつく東奔西走タイムレス
subtitles.english: Supernatural phenomenon, running east and west timelessly.

subtitles.original: 手遅れか？ もう最強か？ 今 焼き付けろ
subtitles.english: Is it too late? Or already the strongest? Burn it in now!

subtitles.original: 超常現象フェノメノン 行きつく東奔西走タイムレス
subtitles.english: Supernatural phenomenon, running east and west timelessly.

subtitles.original: 我らの目で捉えて 煌めいて パン パン パン パン
subtitles.english: Catching it with our eyes, sparkling, bang bang bang bang!

subtitles.original: 満月の夜 くぐり抜けて
subtitles.english: Slipping through the night of the full moon,

subtitles.original: ベールの隙間まで ため息
subtitles.english: a sigh reaching even the gaps in the veil.
